title: spilanthes phaneractis
intro: Spilanthes phaneractis, also known as the Acmella phaneractis, is a tropical plant species belonging to the daisy family, Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in South American folk medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and analgesic effects. The plant contains spilanthol, a sesquiterpene lactone responsible for its health benefits, which include reducing pain, swelling, and inflammation, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antioxidant properties. Spilanthes phaneractis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used topically or internally to address various health concerns.
